falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 at any point in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because August 2024 bottom held above 4200; breaking this level indicates a deeper structural break than the referenced pattern, proving the 78% similarity was coincidental rather than predictive

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggested controlled de-risking; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic-level volatility inconsistent with an orderly bottom formation, invalidating the HOLD signal as complacency

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >25bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A material deepening of curve inversion signals accelerating recession probability that the bottom_2024_aug pattern did not embed; this would prove the macro regime has shifted beyond the historical analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
